content: Open-Meteo Historical Weather API (/v1/archive) supports a daily aggregation param list that includes temperature_2m_mean, temperature_2m_max, and temperature_2m_min directly -- no need to fetch hourly data and aggregate client-side. Requires latitude, longitude, start_date, end_date (ISO8601), daily=..., and timezone. Backed by ERA5 reanalysis (1940-present) at ~25km resolution, ERA5-Land (1950-present) at ~9km.
